message:
docs(readme): fix CLI command syntax in cross-reference section

Update CLI command reference to use the modernized underscore syntax introduced
in commit d283707.

BEFORE: cli file reservations active/soon
AFTER:  cli file_reservations active/soon

This ensures consistency with the CLI syntax modernization that changed all
commands from space-separated to underscore-separated format:
- file reservations → file_reservations
- Positional arguments instead of --project flags

Location: "Working with Inboxes and Acknowledgments" section, "See also" references

Completes the CLI documentation updates across all sections of README.md.

🤖 Generated with Claude Code (https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -1503,7 +1503,7 @@ Use `acknowledge_message` to record receipt; overdue ACKs may be surfaced by bac
 See also:
 - `resource://inbox/{agent}` for inbox browsing
 - `cli acks pending`/`overdue` for reminder views
-- `cli file reservations active/soon` for active file reservations
+- `cli file_reservations active/soon` for active file reservations
 
 ## Claude Code Integration (HTTP MCP + Hooks)
